zh.Bromhall, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾布盧哈爾
zh.lifeSummary: Edward Bromhall於1170年出生在英國爾布盧哈爾。他於1199年與Mrs Bromhall在英國爾布盧哈爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Bromhall, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾布盧哈爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Edward Bromhall于1170年出生在英国爾布盧哈爾。他于1199年与Mrs Bromhall在英国爾布盧哈爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Bromhall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Broomhall
meanings: habitational name from Broomhall (Cheshire), Broomhall Grange in Tyrley and Broom Hall Farm in Brewood (both Staffordshire), Broomhall Farms in Kempsey (Worcestorshire), or Broomhall in Sunningdale (Berkshire, formerly in Windlesham in Surrey), all of which take their name from Old English brōm ‘broom, gorse’ + halh ‘nook, hollow’.
variant of the similar Cheshire name Bramhall , which also has early forms in -o-.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Edward Bromhall was born in 1170, in Broomhall, Cheshire, England. He married Mrs Bromhall in 1199, in Broomhall, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Edward Bromhall est né en 1170, à Broomhall, Cheshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Mrs Bromhall en 1199, à Broomhall, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Edward Bromhall wurde 1170 in Broomhall, Cheshire, England geboren. Er hat 1199 in Broomhall, Cheshire, England Mrs Bromhall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Edward Bromhall è nato il nel 1170 nel Broomhall, Cheshire, England. Lui sposato Mrs Bromhall nel 1199, nel Broomhall, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Broomhall, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアブルームハル
ja.Bromhall, Cheshire, England: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブルームハル
ja.lifeSummary: Edward Bromhallは1170年にイギリスチェシュアイアブルームハルで生まれた。1199年にイギリスチェシュアイアブルームハルでMrs Bromhallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Bromhall(은)는 1170년 영국 체실르 브룸홀에서 태어났다. 그는 1199년 영국 체실르 브룸홀에서 Mrs Bromhall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Edward Bromhall nasceu em 1170, em Broomhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Mrs Bromhall em 1199, em Broomhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Edward Bromhall родился в 1170 г. в местности брумхолл, чешир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Bromhall в 1199 г. в местности брумхолл, чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Edward Bromhall nació en 1170, en Broomhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Mrs Bromhall en 1199, en Broomhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
